reviews.comment:
Un estación de servicios grande, con varias bocas de expendió. Pero con una atención al cliente no tan atenta 🙁, hacer formar fila al rededor de la manzana, ocasionando posibles accidentes, cuando cada boca de expendió soporta tres unidades hace que sea muy incómodo para el cliente ser atendido, ni tan recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
A large gas station with several pumps. But the customer service isn't very attentive 🙁. Making customers form lines around the block, causing potential accidents, when each pump only serves three vehicles, makes it very uncomfortable for customers to be served. Not recommended.

reviews.comment:
Lleve el auto al taller para que este listo para la VTV. Me cobraron 5000 pesos, de los cuales, 2500 por el reemplazo de las escobillas del limpiaparabrisas... 2500!!   Despuès fui a la VTV y mi auto fue rebotado por supuestas malas emisiones de CO2.  Sin embargo este Taller no me dijo nada de eso, y me hizo gastar 2500 en unas escobillas que ni me inspeccionaron en la VTV, y ademàs, me cobraron 1500 de mano de obra.
Una verguenza y una verdadera estafa. No lleven el auto a este taller, cuando me lo devolvieron olia a quemado de tantas horas que lo dejaron bajo el sol,.. todo el cuero de los asientos arruinados.. y el auto encima sucio con manchas amarilla de vaya saber que producto. Una verguenza ACA, nunca màs, cancelo la membresìa.

(Translated by Google)
I took my car to the shop to get it ready for the vehicle inspection (VTV). They charged me 5000 pesos, of which 2500 were for replacing the windshield wiper blades... 2500!! Then I went to the VTV and my car failed due to supposedly bad CO2 emissions. However, this shop didn't tell me anything about that, and they made me spend 2500 on wiper blades that they didn't even inspect at the VTV, and on top of that, they charged me 1500 for labor.
A disgrace and a real rip-off. Don't take your car to this shop. When they returned it to me, it smelled like something was burning from leaving it in the sun for so many hours... all the leather on the seats was ruined... and the car was dirty with yellow stains from who-knows-what product. A disgrace here, never again, I'm canceling my membership.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRZ3ZxcXRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Taller mecánico palermo, desastroso!!!! Precios catastrófico!!! Soy socio hace más de 6 años, me quedé con el coche cross fox sin potencia, andando en tres cilindros, lo remolcamos al taller donde al día siguiente diagnostican cambio de bobina bujías cables y limpieza de inyectores! 10300 pesos!!! Les doy el OK, al día siguiente me llaman diciendo, lo recambiamos y sigue igual! Que ahora tenía quemada una válvula, hacer este trabajo saldría 43mil pesos!!! Nos pareció absurdo y el tipo que da los presupuestos una mala onda como si lo obligaran a trabajar, loco si no te gusta el laburo buscate otro, ahora bien le dijimos que no, que lo dejaran como estaba antes, a lo que exijo que la grúa me lo traslade a mi mecánico de confianza, ya que esto me había ocurrido domingo pasado decidí a ver que pasa con el taller de palermo, cuando recibimos el auto en mi taller de confianza o sorpresa, se afanaron las bujías, dejaron todo tirado en la parte delantera del coche, dejaron floja la correa dentada, y también casualidad cuando mi mecánico destapa tapa de cilindro el árbol de leva partido !!!!! A quien reclamar este daño? Desastroso!!!! Nunca más! A todo esto el laburo que hay que hacerle al auto no sobre pasa las 24 lukas !!!! Estafadores mal!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Palermo Auto Repair Shop - Disastrous!!!! Catastrophic Prices!!! I've been a member for over 6 years. My Cross Fox was running on three cylinders and had no power. We towed it to the shop where the next day they diagnosed the problem: coil replacement, spark plugs, wires, and injector cleaning! 10,300 pesos!!! I gave them the OK. The next day they called me saying, "We replaced them and it's still the same!" They said now a valve was burned out, and doing this job would cost 43,000 pesos!!! We thought it was absurd, and the guy giving the estimates was really mean, like he was being forced to work. If you don't like the job, find another one! Anyway, we told him no, to leave it as it was before. I demanded the tow truck take it to my trusted mechanic, since this had happened to me last Sunday. I decided to see what was going on with the Palermo shop. When we got the car back to my trusted mechanic, surprise, surprise, they had stolen the spark plugs, left everything scattered around the front of the car, loosened the timing belt, and, what a coincidence, when my mechanic removed the cylinder head, the camshaft was broken! Who do I complain to about this damage? Disastrous! Never again! And to top it all off, the work that needs to be done to the car shouldn't even cost more than 24,000 pesos! They're total rip-offs!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbUltYjV3RRAB
